# Welcome to Nimble

> Web Search Agents that turn any website into structured knowledge for AI

## Get Started

Nimble makes it easy to build with web data at scale. Create Web Search Agents for any website — get structured, real-time data delivered through a single API with great unit economics.

Whether you're building AI applications, monitoring competitors, or powering data pipelines, Nimble handles the complexity of web access so you can focus on what you build with the data.
